reasoning_content:
The RISCV .inc files are at `/workspace/YatCC/llvm/task5/include/`. The CMakeLists.txt for task5 expects them at `${YATCC_LLVM_DIR}/task5/include`. But the config.cmake sets `YATCC_LLVM_DIR` to the llvm directory. Let me just copy the files to the right location or symlink them.

Actually, looking more carefully, `TASK5_LLVM_RISCV_GEN_DIR` is set to `${YATCC_LLVM_DIR}/task5/include` and `YATCC_LLVM_DIR` is set in config.cmake. Let me check what value it has.
